searchLedger.hypothesis: FTS early return applies filters before LIMIT

searchActions.result: bm25Search delegates to ftsSearch at hybrid-search.ts:407-424. ftsSearch delegates to fts5Bm25Search at hybrid-search.ts:561-565. sqlite-fts.ts:179-200 applies spec-folder and deprecated-tier filters in WHERE before ORDER BY and LIMIT.

searchLedger.rationale: The early FTS branch does not retain the old limit-before-filter bug for positive limits.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: SQL filter order is WHERE filters, then ORDER BY, then LIMIT.

searchLedger.hypothesis: In-memory BM25 path filters before final slice

searchActions.result: The patched path filters deprecated tier and specFolder at hybrid-search.ts:480-489, then applies .slice(0, limit) at hybrid-search.ts:490 and maps source metadata at hybrid-search.ts:491-494.

searchLedger.rationale: For positive limits, filtered survivors are capped only after scope/deprecated filtering.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No alternate return path in the in-memory branch slices before the metadata filter.

searchLedger.hypothesis: documentCount is sufficient to fetch all query-matching BM25 candidates

searchActions.result: getStats returns documentCount at bm25-index.ts:655-660. Legacy search sorts and slices to the passed limit at bm25-index.ts:650-652; packed search does the same at bm25-index.ts:1326-1330.

searchLedger.rationale: Passing documentCount fetches every scored matching document up to corpus size, so survivors are not missed because the BM25 search cap itself is too small.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: The remaining over-fetch risk is the metadata lookup batch size, reported separately.

searchLedger.hypothesis: No-db/no-specFolder path preserves old candidate limit

searchActions.result: candidateLimit uses documentCount only when specFolder || db is truthy; otherwise it remains limit at hybrid-search.ts:427-430.

searchLedger.rationale: For positive limits with neither db nor specFolder, bm25Search still asks index.search for only limit candidates and applies no metadata filter.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Behavior parity is preserved for the no-db/no-scope path.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Empty matches and specFolder-without-db fail closed

searchActions.result: Metadata lookup only runs when results.length > 0 at hybrid-search.ts:443. If specFolder is present and db is unavailable, bm25Search returns [] at hybrid-search.ts:444-448. Empty result arrays fall through the filter/slice/map chain at hybrid-search.ts:480-494 as [].

searchLedger.rationale: documentCount===0, no query matches, limit greater than survivors, and db-null scoped queries do not leak unscoped candidates.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: These edge paths return empty or all available survivors as expected for positive limits.

searchLedger.hypothesis: In-memory BM25 scope resolution fails closed on DB/metadata errors

searchActions.result: Lines 444-448 return [] when scoped lookup needs DB but DB is unavailable; lines 464-466 return [] on metadata query errors; lines 473-476 return [] if scoped metadata map is unexpectedly null.

searchLedger.rationale: More candidate ids do not create a fail-open path in these branches.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: All observed scope-resolution failure paths return [] rather than unscoped candidates.

searchLedger.hypothesis: In-memory prefix check avoids sibling-prefix leak
searchLedger.rationale: `a/bc` does not start with `a/b/`, so a scope of `a/b` will not match sibling-prefix folders.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: The in-memory prefix semantics include a slash boundary.

searchLedger.hypothesis: FTS lane applies scope and deprecated predicates before ORDER BY LIMIT

searchActions.result: Lines 192-200 put `memory_fts MATCH ?`, `${folderFilter}`, and `${deprecatedTierFilter}` in the WHERE clause before `ORDER BY fts_score DESC` and `LIMIT ?`.

searchLedger.rationale: The specific scope-then-limit bug is not present in the FTS lane.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Filtering occurs in SQL before ranking limit is applied.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Scoped implementation diff stays within BM25 collection and tests

searchActions.result: The scoped diff changes candidateLimit/results collection at hybrid-search.ts:428-433 and final slice at 480-490, plus the BM25 metadata helper and three BM25 tests in hybrid-search.vitest.ts:253-285 and 517-586.

searchLedger.rationale: No unrelated source edit was found in the reviewed implementation diff. The broader worktree is dirty, but those unrelated paths are outside this phase review and not attributable from the reviewed diff.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Reviewed scoped diff only touches the named implementation and test surfaces plus the phase docs folder.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Verification and design claims match reviewed behavior

searchActions.result: Focused run of npx vitest run tests/hybrid-search.vitest.ts reported 1 file passed and 97 tests passed, matching implementation-summary.md:105-108. The docs also disclose full-corpus broad-query risk at spec.md:164-166 and implementation-summary.md:116.

searchLedger.rationale: The over-fetch design, 97-test claim, and FTS-lane-untouched claim match the reviewed code and the focused test output.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No doc overclaim found in the reviewed files.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Changed code comments do not contain banned ephemeral labels

searchActions.result: The added implementation comment at lines 431-432 describes metadata filtering generically. Targeted searches for banned labels such as spec paths, packet/phase numbers, ADR/REQ/TASK/CHK ids in the changed code files returned no matches.

searchLedger.rationale: A hygiene violation would be a hard blocker, but the changed code comments contain durable rationale only.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: No banned ephemeral code-comment labels found in changed code.
